summary: Gruber wraps up the 2007 Daring Fireball membership drive contest, noting that winners have been selected and notified. He thanks the companies that donated prizes and expresses gratitude to readers who financially supported the site. The post marks the one-year anniversary of his decision to write Daring Fireball full-time, and he reflects briefly on the success of that transition. It's a short, sincere thank-you note to his community.
key_points: The membership drive contest winners were selected and notified by email
Multiple companies donated prizes for the contest
April 20 marked one year since Gruber went full-time on Daring Fireball
Reader financial support made full-time independent writing viable
money_quotes: It's very fun to give away piles of cool stuff; I can see why Bob Barker keeps going.
April 20 marked the one-year anniversary of my announcement that I was going to write Daring Fireball full-time.
It's been quite a year, and I couldn't have done it without your continuing support.
key_insight: One year into writing Daring Fireball full-time, Gruber credits reader support as the foundation that made independent tech commentary viable.
